_comment: Schema-drop pin manifest for the UCI MMS conversion plan
Each drop pins the exact upstream artefacts xsd2proto.py may consume.
sha256 == null means the pin is awaiting its trust-on-first-use
bootstrap: run fetch_schemas.py in an environment that can reach the
source, copy the printed hash into this file, and commit.  Until a
drop is pinned, fetch_schemas.py treats its files as UNVERIFIED and
says so loudly; it never silently trusts an unpinned file twice.

uci_2_5_0.description: UCI 2.5 message definitions -- the schema the pinned Sleet v2026.06.01 container validates every PUB/MSG body against (INIT schema_version 002.5.0). Governs profile P1. MessageDefinitions xs:includes SecurityMarkings; both files are passed to xsd2proto together. Upstream is the public USAF UCI standard repo; the git ref below is the exact revision Sleet's own fetch-spec pins (docs/schema-sourcing.md in the sleet repo).

sources.note: Same variable the Phase-4 LA-CAL interop driver uses; may point at the file itself or a directory containing it.
The persistent Kitty Hawk checkout (ams_gra_starter_kit_bringup.md); Sleet loads this file, so any complete checkout contains it.
Public unclassified UCI 2.5 release (Government Owned license, OACWG-governed); ref == Sleet's pinned revision. sha256 bootstrapped from this source 2026-07-11.

agra_5_0a.description: A-GRA / ASK 5.0a message definitions (UCI 2.3 base + MA_* extensions) -- the drop the formal MMS (MA L1 Compliance Table 3-1) is defined against. Governs profile P2. Sibling of uci_2_5_0, NOT the same schema: generated trees are never shared across drops.

sources.note: Directory containing the ASK 5.0a Schema/ files (e.g. a local clone of the a-gra repo).

Public ASK 5.0a release. sha256 bootstrapped 2026-07-11 from this URL; the fetched schema's own version attribute matches the pinned schema_version. Replacing 'main' with the upstream commit hash is still wanted (the GitHub API was unreachable from the bootstrap environment); content integrity is carried by the sha256 pin either way.
